hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git -C "$PWD" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠️  BRANCH ALERT: You are on '$BRANCH' — you MUST create a feature branch before writing any code. Run: git checkout -b feat/task-X.Y-description\"}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"📋 Branch: '$BRANCH' | RULE: Always create feat/task-X.Y branch BEFORE writing any code. Never commit to main.\"}" ; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git (commit|push)'; then BRANCH=$(git -C "$PWD" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"BLOCKED: on '$BRANCH'. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feat/task-X.Y-description\"}"; fi; fi
